descFull: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

hnPosts.title: OfficeCLI: Office suite for AI agents to read and edit Microsoft Office files
